title: Huawei AP266 - WiFi6 indoor Dual Band AP, smart antenna
description: Huawei eKitEngine AP266 is a compact indoor access point (AP) designed according to the Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) standard, offering high-performance and reliable wireless connectivity with speeds of up to 2.975 Gbps . The AP supports simultaneous broadcasting on 2.4 GHz (2x2 MIMO) and 5 GHz (2x2 MIMO) frequency bands. Max. number of access users is 128, Huawei's recommendation is up to 64. With its slim design and versatile installation options, it is suitable for various installations, such as… The access point is equipped with one Gigabit uplink port and four Gigabit downlink ports, one of which supports PoE OUT with max. output power of 15 W. For using of PoE-OUT, an 802.3at/bt input is required. It can be installed on a desk, wall, ceiling, or junction box, ensuring flexible deployment in different scenarios. Thanks to its small size and easy installation, it is ideal for indoor coverage in environments where a network infrastructure needs to be built quickly and easily The AP266 supports management and maintenance through EasyWeb , local WAC controller , or remotely via the HUAWEI eKit App and SNC platform. This flexibility allows for easy deployment and efficient network management, simplifying the operation and maintenance of the entire system With MU-MIMO technology, the AP can transmit data to multiple users simultaneously, maximizing spectrum efficiency and improving performance in high-density user environments. Supporting a bandwidth of 160 MHz and 1024-QAM modulation, the AP achieves speeds of up to 575 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz frequency and 2.4 Gbps on the 5 GHz…
specsSearch: Wireless features Maximum modulation 1024 QAM Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ac - wave2 MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2402 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 23 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 4 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (5) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 802.3bt PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In Max. power consumption [W] 9,4 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 230 Width [mm] 86 Height [mm] 38 Depth [mm] 160 Software Operating mode Access Point IPv6 support Yes Default IP address Dynamic from DHCP Default and Is set by the user at the first startup
